rationale: Educ. Code §11.002 is a general statement of school district responsibility for public education. It contains no operative language regarding homestead exemptions, tax appraisal values, or revenue levels, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: The school districts and charter schools created in accordance with the laws of this state have the primary responsibility for implementing the state's system of public education and ensuring student performance in accordance with this code.
_note: Rule text is a general responsibility provision; no operative tax or exemption language present. Revenue impact on school districts is indirect and not addressed by this statute.
